placeholder.name: Node name (optional)
placeholder.objectPattern: e.g. system.adapter.* or specific object ID

info.objectSubscriptionDescription: Monitors changes to ioBroker object definitions (metadata, configuration, structure).
objectSubscriptionList: Best used with wildcard patterns (e.g., system.adapter.*)
Receives notifications when objects are created, modified, or deleted
Useful for monitoring adapter installations, configuration changes

help.title: ioBroker Object Subscription
help.description: ioBroker object subscription via WebSocket with automatic wildcard detection.
help.purposeDescription: Monitors changes to ioBroker object definitions, including metadata, configuration, and structural changes. Objects define the properties and capabilities of states, channels, devices, and adapters.
help.singleObject: Single Object: Subscribe to one specific object ID
help.wildcardPattern: Wildcard Pattern: Subscribe to multiple objects matching a pattern (recommended)
help.objectPatternDescription: The ioBroker object ID or wildcard pattern to monitor
help.outputPropertyDescription: Message property to store the object data (default: payload)
